steps.title: Spot the temporal shift
steps.content: The passage moves from the 2003 discovery of one moon (Helike) to a statement about the total number of moons discovered today. The key signal is the progression from a specific past moment to the present state.

steps.title: Apply the temporal transition
steps.content: ”To date” means “up to the present time” — it bridges the 2003 discovery with the current total of eighty moons, showing how much discovery has accumulated over the decades. The other three choices either introduce an unrelated example, restate the relationship, or create a false contrast. That matches choice A — A is correct.
